explanation_text: National resources were allocated because district and state stocks were insufficient to meet demand. Escalation minimized unmet demand as enforced by the dominant objective.
Unmet demand occurred because all available district, state, and national resources were exhausted. The model records unmet demand explicitly to ensure transparency under total resource failure.
